metadata.description: Structured data helpers for format conversion, JSON extraction, and JSON Schema validation.
metadata.summary: Convert json/csv/yaml/toml, extract JSON values, and validate JSON with schemas.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Convert Data
capabilities.description: Convert structured data between json, yaml, toml, and csv. Prefer stdin for the source payload and --json for structured command output.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Source format: json, yaml, toml, or csv.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Target format: json, yaml, toml, or csv.

output.description: Structured conversion result including normalized format metadata, JSON intermediate value, and rendered output text.

capabilities.name: Extract JSON Value
capabilities.description: Extract a JSON value using either JSON Pointer or a simple dotted path expression.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: JSON Pointer (/a/b/0) or dotted path (a.b.0) to extract.

output.description: Structured extraction result with the extracted JSON value and normalized query kind metadata.

capabilities.name: Validate JSON
capabilities.description: Validate input JSON against a supplied JSON Schema and return a structured validity report.

parameters.name: schema
parameters.description: Inline JSON Schema string or schema reference accepted by the future CLI surface.

output.description: ValidateResult JSON containing a boolean valid flag and zero or more validation error messages.

constraints.description: The data skill operates on structured document formats and does not attempt lossy schema inference or opaque binary transformations.
Extraction is limited to JSON inputs and supports JSON Pointer plus simple dotted path addressing.

triggers.description: When structured data needs to move between json, yaml, toml, or csv.
When a JSON field must be selected by pointer or dotted path.
When JSON payloads need schema-based validity checks.
